formulas.name: lambda_aggregate
formulas.doc: Canonical Lutar invariant Λ — WEIGHTED GEOMETRIC MEAN (definition D2).

formulas.name: lambda_homogeneous
formulas.doc: A2 IsHomogeneous: returns True iff Λ(c·x) == c·Λ(x) within ε.

formulas.name: lambda_bounded
formulas.doc: A4 IsBounded: returns True iff Λ(x) <= max(x) within ε.

formulas.name: pac_bayes_mcallester
formulas.doc: McAllester PAC-Bayes generalization bound.

formulas.name: bekenstein_cascade
formulas.doc: Bekenstein universal entropy bound (information cap on a receipt chain).

formulas.name: reidemeister_invariant
formulas.doc: Apply a Reidemeister move to a braid word; returns the transformed word.

formulas.name: khipu_merkle_root
formulas.doc: Khipu summation-invariant Merkle DAG root over leaf receipts.

formulas.name: dsse_envelope
formulas.doc: Build a DSSE (Dead-Simple-Signing-Envelope) with a PLACEHOLDER signature.

formulas.name: dsse_envelope_real
formulas.proof_status: REAL(Sigstore keyless: Fulcio cert + Rekor); CI-only
formulas.doc: Build a DSSE envelope with a GENUINE Sigstore keyless signature (Tier B).

formulas.name: gleason_quantum_lambda
formulas.doc: Quantum-axis trust score via Gleason's theorem: p = Tr(ρ) purity-style.

formulas.name: hoeffding_tail
formulas.doc: Hoeffding tail bound for bounded [0,1] i.i.d. means.

formulas.name: pinsker_kl_bound
formulas.doc: Pinsker: lower-bounds KL by total-variation: KL(p||q) ≥ 2·TV(p,q)².

formulas.name: fisher_rao_distance
formulas.doc: Fisher-Rao geodesic distance between two distributions on the simplex.

formulas.name: bohr_complementarity_floor
formulas.doc: Complementarity floor: returns True iff σ_A · σ_B ≥ 0.25.

formulas.name: kochen_specker_18vector_witness
formulas.doc: Cabello KS-18 contextuality witness over a 4D state-independent set.

formulas.name: two_witness_ks18_soundness
formulas.doc: TwoWitness soundness: a contextuality verdict is sound iff TWO independent

formulas.name: shor_codeword_distance
formulas.doc: Minimum Hamming distance of a codeword set to the all-zero codeword.

formulas.name: css_ingress_verify
formulas.doc: CSS-ingress verifier: binds a DSSE envelope to a CSS (Calderbank-Shor-Steane)

formulas.name: kitaev_surface_correct
formulas.doc: Minimal surface-code correction: flips qubits indicated by the syndrome.

formulas.name: reed_solomon_singleton
formulas.doc: Singleton bound: maximum minimum-distance of an [n,k] code is n - k + 1.

formulas.name: madhava_series
formulas.doc: Mādhava (Leibniz-Gregory) series for arctangent:

formulas.name: schur_concave_lambda_two_axis
formulas.doc: Two-axis Schur-concavity witness for Λ: averaging axes never decreases Λ.
